programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield's hooked on a weight loss drug. Homer's not sold on it, until Marge begs him to take it. But there's a side effect..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: S. I Hate You: Marge's reputation as Springfield's nicest resident is jeopardised when her secret stash of vitriolic letters is stolen during a house party.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Pearl tries to build bridges between torn families, while Jack's caught in the middle of Beth and Nancy. Diane confides in Tony and Leela about her fears. And a resident wants the truth..

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programme.desc: The homestays continue, but real-world problems are putting all of the couples under strain. And there's a devastating confession.

programme.title: Made in Chelsea: Sam Vanderpump's Story - Brand new series
programme.desc: Sam and Alice navigate joy and hardship as they prepare for parenthood while Sam grapples with the idea of a living donor liver transplant.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics have been watching: Sitting on a Fortune, Close to Me, You, Nadiya's Fast Flavours, Animal, UFO Witness and This Morning.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dog groomer Nico is after the perfect partner to get her all hot under the collar, while care worker Patrice wants a divine angel who can also be a horny devil in the bedroom.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A surprise ending leads to a First Dates first in this episode. The daters include self-confessed failure Arj, stand-up comedian Lynn, who's 82, and fantasy novelist Sarah.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The homestays continue, but real-world problems are putting all of the couples under strain. And there's a devastating confession.

programme.title: Made in Chelsea: Sam Vanderpump's Story - Brand new series
programme.desc: Sam and Alice navigate joy and hardship as they prepare for parenthood while Sam grapples with the idea of a living donor liver transplant.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When they return home from college orientation, Adam and Brea each confess secrets that could affect the future of their relationship.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff and Joanne's Valentine's celebration sets an uncomfortable example for the Goldbergs.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with All the Pixies: Sam has £13k to spend on his pixie wedding to his love, Luanne. Will Luanne, who dreams of a traditional service, appreciate his scheme.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family are invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football, but an incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things awkward for Gloria and Claire.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: On the kids' first day back at school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire's coping with an empty nest.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Chappy's in Tennessee, where the chef and owner's careless methods and less-than-appetising food have hurt his restaurant's local reputation.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry comes face-to-face with his ex-girlfriends and their boyfriends during Erica and Geoff's joint bachelor/bachelorette party.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding, Erica rebels against Beverly's over-the-top plans for the big day.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: After selling a house to Mitch and Cam's friends, Phil and Claire take them out for a celebratory dinner but get drunk and overshare.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: It's a day of disturbing realisations when Mitchell manages to ruin one of Jay's proudest golf moments. Gloria stumbles upon Claire's dangerous little secret.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The homestays continue, but real-world problems are putting all of the couples under strain. And there's a devastating confession.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Aaron, who won The Traitors' first season, is out on a date with a straight-A student Laura. Plus: a date on roller skates and a Mr Bean impression.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: At Amy's Baking Company in Scottsdale, Arizona, Gordon Ramsay meets a husband and wife team with a shocking contempt for customer feedback.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa finds himself embroiled in a cold case when the police unearth an old coffin with his business card in it - and two bodies.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The women of Springfield take centre stage, with some special Simpsonified movie parodies including Barbie and The Chronicles of Narnia.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay makes it clear that he wants to keep his birthday as low-key as possible.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire have a five-year plan - to vacation and enjoy life once Luke leaves for college. To keep the plan on track, Phil decides to have a vasectomy.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The homestays continue, but real-world problems are putting all of the couples under strain. And there's a devastating confession.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: BFFs Emma and Dani have disastrous dating records - will double dating help? Aire from Venezuela wants someone 'a bit crazy'. Does colourful-trouser-wearing Mark fit the bill.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa and Moe bond over baseball, and hatch a plan to make the Springfield Isotopes great again.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's obsessed with an extreme eating show. Somehow, that ends up with him getting chased by the mob when a stew recipe is stolen from Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes friends with Shauna Chalmers over a shared love of music. Homer does the same with Superintendent Chalmers, over a shared love of beer.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programme.desc: Distrust and uncertainty are hanging in the air like a bad smell after the homestays. So what better time for the penultimate dinner party.

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party - Brand new series
programme.desc: David talks about his struggles with Alissa after the homestays. And MAFS royalty Domenica Calarco and Jamie Marinos give their take on the series.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.sub-title: What do the Goggleboxers think of The Graham Norton Show; Mary Berry
programme.desc: Love to Cook; Celebrity Antiques Road Trip; Strictly; The Lakes with Simon Reeve; and Sex: Unzipped.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A storm brews as hairdresser Ben breezes in for his date with Daisy. Fantasy writer Sarah returns after her last date went awry. And a steamy first kiss is on the cards.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Student Josh has never had any luck chatting up the ladies... can Naked Attraction help? And performer Jack's after that special someone to give him a standing ovation.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Distrust and uncertainty are hanging in the air like a bad smell after the homestays. So what better time for the penultimate dinner party.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.sub-title: What do the Goggleboxers think of The Graham Norton Show; Mary Berry
programme.desc: Love to Cook; Celebrity Antiques Road Trip; Strictly; The Lakes with Simon Reeve; and Sex: Unzipped.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry comes face-to-face with his ex-girlfriends and their boyfriends during Erica and Geoff's joint bachelor/bachelorette party.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding, Erica rebels against Beverly's over-the-top plans for the big day.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Elle has her heart set on a classy wedding at Liverpool's iconic Liver Building. But Phil plans a big day to go down in history.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family supports Manny's new interest - fencing. It turns out he's pretty good at it, but Jay's proud enthusiasm triggers an old childhood wound for Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: With a history of giving bad gifts, Claire is determined to surprise Phil with an amazing anniversary present - a private performance by Izzy LaFontaine.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: At Amy's Baking Company in Scottsdale, Arizona, Gordon Ramsay meets a husband and wife team with a shocking contempt for customer feedback.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: To avoid spending Spring Break with his mum, Adam housesits Erica's downtown apartment. Barry and the JTP hope to become a boyband sensation.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Strangest Affair of All Time: When Murray goes out of town, Jane Bales attempts to make a power grab at the Ottoman Empire, forcing Beverly to retaliate.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron's birthday falls on 29 February, and with the celebrations coming but once every four years, there's loads of pressure on Mitchell to get it right.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The funeral service for a beloved clown mentor reunites Cameron with his estranged ex-clown partner, Lewis. And Manny has a cool new friend.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa seek revenge on their teachers. Krusty's latest snack turns Springfield's citizens into zombies. Moe's beer is tainted with Homer's blood.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge becomes famous when she poses for a racy charity calendar. Mr Burns promotes Carl to supervisor.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer discovers that Cletus and his pals are making moonshine. Lisa gets to know three teenage Wiccans. Guest starring Neve Campbell.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: BFFs Emma and Dani have disastrous dating records - will double dating help? Aire from Venezuela wants someone 'a bit crazy'. Does colourful-trouser-wearing Mark fit the bill.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon revisits the most contentious restaurant he's ever tried to rescue - Amy's Baking Company, in Scottsdale, Arizona.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror Presents Simpsons Wicked This Way Comes: A mysterious tattoo-covered fella at the carnival tells Lisa three surreal stories.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons endure a nightmare flight on Convenience Airways - the only airline in America that Homer's isn't banned from.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: On her first day at kindergarten, Lily gets into a tussle with a little boy, and Mitch and Cam have to meet his confrontational parents.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke wants to quit magic, but Phil can't accept it. One of Gloria's new pregnancy symptoms is snoring and she's keeping the whole house awake.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa seek revenge on their teachers. Krusty's latest snack turns Springfield's citizens into zombies. Moe's beer is tainted with Homer's blood.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge becomes famous when she poses for a racy charity calendar. Mr Burns promotes Carl to supervisor.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer discovers that Cletus and his pals are making moonshine. Lisa gets to know three teenage Wiccans. Guest starring Neve Campbell.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Will avid reader Jean and crime writer Andy have a happy ending? Trainee barrister Holly and Marcella hit it off instantly. But is Marcella cool about Holly's sexy side hustle.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa and Homer accidentally invent a new sport while arguing in a drained pool. But trouble arrives when Big Avocado sponsors it.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart and Lisa lose interest in their only shared love, Marge worries they'll drift apart as they grow up. Cue a glimpse into the future.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds out that Marge was an accomplished prankster in middle school - and he's desperate for her to rediscover her mischievous ways.
